title: bashcompletion enhancements
body:
* now all podman subcommands can be completed
* images can be completed when run as root (not sudo)
* bug corrected that made podman_top and podman_tag

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM. 

Would like to get the container names to be listed also.

ill look at it as time allows ... can we merge this for now ?

Tests are green, so sure.
